title: Homemade Pasta Carbonara
description: Made this from scratch after a long week — the pasta was hand-rolled and everything. Honestly the best carbonara I've ever had.

title: Mango Sticky Rice
description: Surprised me with this after I mentioned I'd never tried it. The coconut cream was homemade.

title: Sunday Shakshuka
description: Lazy Sunday breakfast. Spiced just right with harissa and feta on top. We ate it straight from the pan.

title: Lemon Tart
description: She spent the whole afternoon on this. The crust was buttery and the filling had the perfect tartness.

title: Ramen from Scratch
description: 12-hour broth. I'm not exaggerating. The chashu pork melted in my mouth and the soft-boiled eggs were perfectly marinated.

title: Roasted Tomato Soup
description: A cold rainy evening and she showed up with this. Served with sourdough croutons she toasted herself.

title: Chocolate Fondant
description: She nailed the timing perfectly — still molten in the center. Served with vanilla bean ice cream.

title: Poke Bowl
description: Fresh ahi tuna, mango, edamame, pickled cucumber. Ate this in about 4 minutes flat.
